recent_excerpts: The Gentlemen ransomware-as-a-service operation has infected over 320 victims, deploying separate encryptors for Windows/Linux and VMware ESXi systems to maximize disruption and ransom pressure on ent
CVE-2026-1731, a critical 9.8 CVSS flaw in BeyondTrust's Bomgar RMM, is being actively exploited to deploy ransomware and compromise IT service providers in global supply chain attacks.
Kyber ransomware deploys two distinct payloads to encrypt both Windows systems and VMware ESXi servers, using a custom tool to wipe ESXi snapshots and hinder recovery.
